subcodes.first_line: O Jamshid the Valiant! His Holiness Jam found no fidelity in this twisted and winding world, nor tasted any honey of his desires [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای جمشید رشید حضرت جم از اینجهان پر پیچ و خم وفاای ندید و شهدی نچشید و بارزو
subcodes.subjects: @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
